$description: Per-tenant token overlay starter. Copy this file to tenants/<slug>/tokens.json and add your brand overrides. See README.md and docs/architecture/tenant-token-overlay-format.md for the rules. Every key under a token group becomes a token path; this template is intentionally empty so the validator does not yield example leaves. Uncomment and adapt the block below to override semantic.accent.rest, the most common starting point.
_uncomment_to_activate_a_brand_accent_ov: Replace the leading underscore on the 'semantic' key (and the placeholder hex values) below to activate. Then run `pnpm tokens` to compile.

rest.$description: Tenant primary accent — PLACEHOLDER, replace with brand hex.

padding.$description: Tenant component padding baseline — PLACEHOLDER (tightened from base 24px to 16px). See tenants/brutalist-demo/ for a full worked exemplar.

_uncomment_to_activate_a_shape_density_o: Replace the leading underscore on the 'role' key below (and the 'space' block already nested in the 'semantic' key above) to give this tenant its own shape/density identity — sharp/dense, round/airy, etc. Then run `pnpm tokens` to compile. The Compact mode on 'space.component.padding' above tightens further under [data-density="compact"]; 'role.radius' below has no Compact mode, so it stays density-invariant. See docs/architecture/tenant-token-overlay-format.md R9 (ADR-022).
